panels.scene: A single teacup sits out of place on the floor of the empty room; a trace of cold air by the shelf.
panels.narration: The chair was set for a mother who left long ago. An unspoken grief clings to the wood.

panels.scene: Mist gathers at the torii threshold; still water beyond.

panels.action: The child-spirit fades at the shrine gate; a quiet farewell.
panels.narration: She watches them go and is left alone in the empty house.
The residue settles in her chest; the cost of hearing what others cannot.
